calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendants/Appellants Dr. Tricia Devin and Sonoma College are not present.
Plaintiff/Respondent Shamari Roberson present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent Shamari Roberson testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court ordered Judgment be entered in favor of Plaintiff /Respondent Shamari Roberson in the amount of $2,280.31 Principal, $70.00 Costs and $159.00 Interest for a total Judgment of $2,509.31.

Exhibits referenced from the court file are returned to Plaintiff/Respondent by the Court.
The Court retains copies of the checks.

JPT Jeffrey S. Ross, Clerk Vicki Mack, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Judgment Entered
